Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course title 'Intelligent Supply Chain: Trends and Applications' and topics like 'Big Data & Manufacturing (Industry 4.0)' are fundamentally about industrial innovation, upgrading infrastructure, and enhancing technological capabilities (Targets 9.2, 9.4, 9.5).
